name: Usopp (042)
effect_text: All of your "Dressrosa" type Characters with a cost of 2 or more gain +1 cost.[Opponent's Turn] [Once Per Turn] This effect can be activated when your "Dressrosa" type Character is removed from the field by your opponent's effect or K.O.'d. If you have 5 or less cards in your hand, draw 1 card.
